meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Template: Escape Tutorial Hell as a Freelancer
content.seo_description: Break free from tutorial hell. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional SaaS apps faster. Expert guide for freelancers.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start scaffolding. The Antigravity template provides a production-ready foundation, allowing you to bypass boilerplate. By pairing this framework with Claude Code, you automate the heavy lifting, enabling you to deliver client-ready SaaS applications in hours rather than weeks of configuration.
content.intro:
You’ve spent countless hours in the loop of watching tutorials, yet your portfolio remains empty and your client pipeline is dry. The industry calls it 'tutorial hell,' but for a freelancer, it’s a direct hit to your bottom line. Every minute spent toggling between video tabs is a minute you aren't shipping value to a paying client.

It’s time to stop learning and start building. The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard scaffold designed to get you from 'git init' to deployment in record time. By combining this architecture with the surgical precision of Claude Code, you aren't just coding; you're engineering professional-grade software at the speed of thought.

steps.title: Initialize the Foundation
steps.description: Clone the Antigravity template to establish a robust directory structure that handles authentication, database connections, and API routing out of the box.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new project using the Antigravity base template with Next.js 14, Tailwind CSS, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Define Domain Models
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map your client's business logic into the template's schema to ensure type safety across the entire stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Prisma schema based on a standard SaaS user-subscription model with roles for Admin, Member, and Guest.

steps.title: Implement Protected Routing
steps.description: Secure your application endpoints using the built-in middleware patterns found in the Antigravity template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the middleware.ts file to protect all /dashboard routes and redirect unauthorized users to /login.

steps.title: Automate API Endpoints
steps.description: Leverage the template's standardized API handlers to expose your data without writing repetitive boilerplate code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a CRUD API route for the project resource that includes Zod validation and error handling.

steps.title: Deploy to Edge
steps.description: Verify your build output and push to production to finalize the delivery for your client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a production build check and generate the Vercel deployment configuration.

pro_tips: Always run your schema migrations through Claude Code to ensure the database state matches your local TypeScript interfaces.
Use Antigravity's 'Service-Worker' pattern to offload long-running background tasks, preventing client-side timeouts.
Keep your prompt library for Claude Code in a local .md file to maintain consistency across multiple client projects.
Inject your client's brand variables into the Antigravity theme config immediately to make the app feel bespoke from day one.
Use the 'diff' mode in Claude Code when iterating on existing code to prevent breaking the core Antigravity architecture.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, focus on building a reusable library of your own components to extend the Antigravity template, turning your freelance work into a scalable product machine.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap. Stop watching others build and start claiming your stake in the AI economy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
